$comment: Valid equipment codes. 'code' MUST match the Equipment enum (Modules.ExerciseModule.Entities.Equipment). Cable/pulley movements are their own code; other finer real-world equipment (kettlebell, cardio machine) maps onto the closest code and is preserved verbatim in the exercise 'equipmentDetail' field (and surfaced as a search tag) until the schema is upgraded. Used by ExerciseSeedDataValidator.

equipment.displayName: Dumbbell (and other hand-held free weights, e.g. Kettlebell)
